title: Secretary Spec — AI Billing & Subscription Index
spec_type: subsystem + schema + poller + view + alert mechanism
core_claim: Real-time-where-possible ledger of AI subscriptions and API accounts. Invisible operational substrate failures cascade everywhere; visibility is the countermeasure.
components: Poller — fetches usage from Anthropic + OpenAI endpoints every few hours
Billing view — Settings tab or top-level tab showing health/limits/renewals
Alert mechanism — threshold events surface as morning-grid commitment candidates

upstream: Grid generator needs to accept typed alert inputs
Anthropic + OpenAI API credentials configured (chicken-and-egg with the substrate the ledger monitors)
downstream_soft: TCL integration — billing events could log to day ledger, not required for v1

open_questions: Alert thresholds: global defaults vs. per-account configurable?
Manual-entry cadence for providers without usage endpoints?
Does ledger capture one-off top-ups / prepaid credits?
Polling frequency per provider; back-off behavior near limits?
